notes: Japanese-issued certificates must be dated within 3 months of application.
Documents in foreign languages must include a Japanese translation.
Additional documents may be requested during the review process.
If any required document cannot be submitted, include a written explanation (理由書) with author name and date.

documents.nameJa: 永住許可申請書
documents.nameEn: Permanent Residence Application Form
documents.noteEn: Download from the Immigration Services Agency website. Ensure all required fields are completed.
documents.noteJa: 出入国在留管理庁ホームページからダウンロードできます。必要な事項が全て記載されていることを確認してください。

documents.nameJa: 写真（縦4cm×横3cm）
documents.nameEn: Passport-size Photo (4cm × 3cm)
documents.noteEn: Taken within 6 months before application. Front-facing, no hat, plain background, clearly visible. Write applicant's name on the back and attach to the application form. Applicants under age 1 are exempt (rule changed as of June 14, 2026 for new residence cards).
documents.noteJa: 申請前6か月以内に正面から撮影された無帽、無背景、鮮明なもの。裏面に氏名を記載して申請書に貼付。1歳未満の方は不要。

documents.nameJa: 配偶者の戸籍謄本（全部事項証明書）
documents.nameEn: Spouse's Family Register (Full Certificate)

documents.nameJa: 申請人の国籍国の機関から発行された婚姻証明書
documents.nameEn: Marriage Certificate Issued by Applicant's Home Country Authority

documents.nameJa: 申請人を含む家族全員（世帯）の住民票
documents.nameEn: Resident Register for All Household Members
documents.noteEn: Omit My Number (individual number). Do not omit any other fields.
documents.noteJa: 個人番号（マイナンバー）は省略し、他の事項については省略のないものを提出してください。

documents.nameJa: 職業を証明する資料
documents.nameEn: Proof of Occupation
documents.noteEn: One of: (1) Employment certificate for company employees; (2a) Copy of tax return + (2b) business license copy for self-employed; (3) Written explanation and supporting materials for other cases. If both parties are unemployed, submit a written statement to that effect.
documents.noteJa: 会社等勤務：在職証明書、自営業等：確定申告書控えの写し及び営業許可書の写し（ある場合）、その他：職業に係る説明書及び立証資料。両者とも無職の場合もその旨の説明書を提出。

documents.nameJa: 直近3年分の住民税の課税（又は非課税）証明書
documents.nameEn: Municipal Resident Tax Certificate — most recent 3 years
documents.noteEn: Issued by your city/ward/town office. Must show total annual income and tax payment status. Submit up to 3 years; if fewer years are available, submit the maximum available. Confirm no missed or late payments.
documents.noteJa: お住まいの市区町村から発行。1年間の総所得及び納税状況が記載されたもの。直近3年分が発行されない場合は最長期間分を提出。未納・遅延納付がないことを確認してください。

documents.nameJa: 直近3年分の住民税の納税証明書
documents.nameEn: Municipal Resident Tax Payment Certificate — most recent 3 years
documents.noteEn: Issued by your city/ward/town office. Shows payment status for each year. Can substitute either #7 or #8 if the certificate covers both total income and tax payment status.
documents.noteJa: お住まいの市区町村から発行。1年間の総所得及び納税状況が記載されたもの。

documents.nameJa: 直近3年間において住民税を適正な時期に納めていることを証明する資料（通帳の写し、領収証書等）
documents.nameEn: Proof of Timely Resident Tax Payments — most recent 3 years (bank passbook copy or receipts)
documents.conditionNote: Required only if resident tax was NOT withheld at source (特別徴収 / payroll deduction) during any part of the past 3 years. If tax was withheld at source for the entire 3-year period, submit only #7 and #8.
documents.noteEn: Web banking screenshots showing transaction history are acceptable. If unable to submit, include a written explanation (理由書).
documents.noteJa: 住民税が特別徴収されていない期間がある方のみ提出。Web通帳の画面写しも可。提出困難な場合は理由書を提出。

documents.nameJa: 国税の納税証明書（その3）
documents.nameEn: National Tax Payment Certificate — Form 3
documents.noteEn: Issued by your local Tax Office (税務署). Covers all 5 tax types: withholding income tax, self-assessed income tax, consumption tax, inheritance tax, and gift tax. Form 3 certifies no outstanding obligations as of the certificate date — no period specification needed. Submit certificates for all 5 tax types.
documents.noteJa: 住所地を管轄する税務署から発行。源泉所得税、申告所得税、消費税・地方消費税、相続税、贈与税の5税目全ての納税証明書を提出。未納がないことを確認してください。

documents.nameJa: 年金事務所発行の「被保険者記録照会回答票」「被保険者記録照会（納付Ⅰ）」「被保険者記録照会（納付Ⅱ）」
documents.nameEn: Pension Enrollment & Contribution Record (issued by Pension Office)
documents.noteEn: Request from your nearest pension office (年金事務所) in person or by phone. Alternatives accepted: (a) Nenkin Statement (ねんきん定期便) showing full record history — letter-format only (age 35, 45, 59 birthmonth mailings); (b) Monthly record printout from Nenkin Net including national pension payment history if applicable; (c) National Pension receipts (写し) for the past 2 years. Redact your Basic Pension Number before submitting. Confirm no missed or late payments.
documents.noteJa: 最寄りの年金事務所へ問い合わせ。代替可能：ねんきん定期便（全期間・封書形式のみ）、ねんきんネットの各月記録（国民年金加入期間がある場合は国民年金年金記録も）、国民年金保険料領収証書。基礎年金番号は黒塗りにして提出。未納・遅延納付がないことを確認してください。

documents.nameJa: 世帯全員分の健康保険被保険者証（写し）
documents.nameEn: Employee Health Insurance Card — All Household Members (copy)
documents.conditionNote: Submit if currently enrolled in Employee Health Insurance (健康保険). If enrolled continuously for the entire past 2 years, items #13–#15 are not needed.
documents.noteEn: Redact insurer number (保険者番号) and insured person symbol/number (被保険者等記号・番号) before submitting.
documents.noteJa: 保険者番号及び被保険者等記号・番号を黒塗りにして提出。直近2年間すべて健康保険に加入していた方は13〜15は不要。

documents.nameJa: 世帯全員分の国民健康保険被保険者証（写し）
documents.nameEn: National Health Insurance Card — All Household Members (copy)
documents.conditionNote: Submit if currently enrolled in National Health Insurance (国民健康保険).
documents.noteEn: Redact insurer number and insured person symbol/number before submitting.
documents.noteJa: 保険者番号及び被保険者等記号・番号を黒塗りにして提出。

documents.nameJa: 直近2年間の国民健康保険料（税）納付証明書
documents.nameEn: National Health Insurance Premium Payment Certificate — past 2 years
documents.conditionNote: Submit if enrolled in National Health Insurance during any part of the past 2 years. Confirm no missed or late payments.
documents.noteEn: Redact insurer number and insured person symbol/number before submitting.
documents.noteJa: 保険者番号及び被保険者等記号・番号を黒塗りにして提出。未納・遅延納付がないことを確認してください。

documents.nameJa: 直近2年間の国民健康保険料（税）領収証書（写し）
documents.nameEn: National Health Insurance Premium Receipts — past 2 years (copy)
documents.conditionNote: Submit if enrolled in National Health Insurance during any part of the past 2 years. Submit all receipts for the applicable period. If unable to submit, include a written explanation (理由書).
documents.noteEn: Redact insurer number and insured person symbol/number. Confirm no missed or late payments.
documents.noteJa: 保険者番号及び被保険者等記号・番号を黒塗りにして提出。未納・遅延納付がないことを確認してください。

documents.nameJa: 直近2年間の健康保険・厚生年金保険料領収証書（写し）
documents.nameEn: Employee Health & Welfare Pension Insurance Premium Receipts — past 2 years (copy)
documents.conditionNote: Submit either #16 or #17 if you operated a business subject to social insurance (社会保険適用事業所の事業主) during any part of the past 2 years.
documents.noteEn: Confirm no missed or late payments.
documents.noteJa: 申請時の直近2年間において社会保険適用事業所の事業主であった期間がある方は16または17を提出。未納・遅延納付がないことを確認してください。

documents.nameJa: 直近2年間の社会保険料納入証明書又は社会保険料納入確認（申請）書
documents.nameEn: Social Insurance Premium Payment Certificate — past 2 years
documents.conditionNote: Alternative to #16 for business owners. Certifies no outstanding social insurance premiums.

documents.nameJa: 親族一覧表
documents.nameEn: Family Members List

documents.nameJa: 身元保証書
documents.nameEn: Guarantor Letter
documents.noteEn: The guarantor is typically a Japanese national, permanent resident, or special permanent resident residing in Japan.
documents.noteJa: 身元保証人には、通常、日本に居住する日本人、永住者又は特別永住者の方になっていただきます。

documents.nameJa: 身元保証書に係る資料
documents.nameEn: Guarantor Identification Documents
documents.noteEn: Documents verifying the guarantor's identity, e.g., copy of driver's license or residence card.
documents.noteJa: 身元保証人の身分事項を明らかにする書類（運転免許証、在留カードの写し等）。

documents.nameJa: 了解書
documents.nameEn: Acknowledgement Letter
documents.noteEn: Download from the Immigration Services Agency website.
documents.noteJa: 出入国在留管理庁ホームページからダウンロードできます。
